priority: Deterministic SSH2 facade and libssh2 backend gap
scope: Registered SSH2 functions, facade classes, and common constants
Request-local SSH2 session handles without implicit network access
Request-local SFTP handle modeling attached to sessions
Credential-safe auth failures without logging usernames, passwords, or key passphrases
Deterministic methods/fingerprint shapes for app control flow
Explicit failure for exec, shell, tunnel, SCP, and backend-required SFTP operations
non_scope: Real authentication, command execution, channels, forwarding, SCP, SFTP filesystem mutation, and host key validation
next_step: Add a libssh2-backed opt-in fixture before promoting live SSH2 integration tests.
